author: gb9t
content: Iter 70 result: drivers/md/dm-crypt.md (LUKS encryption target - dm-crypt.c ~3723 lines; per-target CryptConfig with per-CPU sk-cipher tfm pool + per-bio DmCryptIo + IV gen modes (plain/plain64/essiv/lmk/tcw/eboiv/random) + AEAD authenticated-encryption + workqueue async-cipher dispatch + crypt_wipe_key with memzero_explicit + cryptsetup LUKS use case) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-sgx.md (SGX-in-VM virtualization - sgx.c ~510 lines; per-VM SGX-LC MSRs + ENCLS leaf intercept (ECREATE/EINIT/EADD/EREMOVE) + ENCLU native execution + per-VM EPC region partitioning + per-VM lepubkeyhash for launch-control + nested-SGX support). 90 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-integrity.md (per-sector data-integrity authenticated-encryption) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-pebs.md (Intel PEBS Precise-Event-Based-Sampling virtualization).
